## Fervo Energy Drops 18.6% After Weak Profitability Metrics and Governance Concerns

A combined profitability-and-governance selloff suggests structural risk beyond a single-session event; limited direct read-through for a tech PM unless FRVO is held for energy-transition exposure, but the governance flag warrants monitoring.

- FRVO shares fell 18.6% per the headline.
- Weak profitability metrics cited as a primary driver of the decline.
- Governance concerns flagged as a second contributing factor.
- Specific nature of the governance issues and profitability shortfalls are not described in the headline.
